positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist jungle fauna scene. Focus on a central composition of a majestic Bengal tiger, surrounded by tropical rainforest elements. The tiger should be depicted in a striking, clean silhouette style, standing proudly. Include stylized flora such as massive monstera leaves, exotic orchids, and vibrant tropical berries forming a lush border. The overall aesthetic should be high-contrast, limited color palette (deep emerald greens, burnt oranges, gold accents, and black), and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use vector-like precision, clean lines, and dynamic negative space. Composition must be balanced and centered, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. Style: Neo-Muralism, illustrative, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, logo, text, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, washed out, noise, grain, grainy, poor resolution
